data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of personalization variables such as name, time, provider, location, and custom fields. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm these variables are being utilized in the SMS reminders or any other part of the system. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm the implementation of these personalization variables is missing.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of personalization variables (name, time, provider, location, custom fields).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
